---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for velox-terminal
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of **the problem** you're trying to solve. What is missing or inadequate in the current terminal?

Example: *"I find it difficult to track my P&L in real-time while scalping. The current position panel doesn't show unrealized P&L in the account currency."*

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be specific about:

- **What should happen** — the desired behavior
- **Where in the UI** — which panel or interaction
- **Configuration** — should it be customizable?
- **Default state** — should it be enabled by default or opt-in?

```rust
// Optional: sketch of a type signature, trait, or API shape
```

---

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered and why they don't fully address the problem.

- Alternative 1: ...
- Alternative 2: ...
- Why they fall short: ...

---

## Target Users

Who would benefit from this feature?

- [ ] Scalpers (short-term, high-frequency)
- [ ] Swing traders (multi-day positions)
- [ ] Algorithmic traders (automated strategies)
- [ ] Portfolio managers
- [ ] Developers / integrators
- [ ] All users

---

## Impact

- How many users would this affect?
- Is this a nice-to-have or a must-have for your workflow?

---

## Would You Implement It Yourself?

- [ ] Yes, I'm willing to implement this feature and submit a PR
- [ ] Yes, with mentorship from a maintainer
- [ ] No, I'm suggesting this for the community

If you're willing to implement it, please let us know your experience level so we can provide appropriate guidance.

---

## Additional Context

- Screenshots or mockups of similar features in other tools (NinjaTrader, ATAS, TradingView, etc.)
- Links to relevant discussions or documentation
- Any other context that would help evaluate this request
